title: ammophila arenaria var. arundinacea
intro: Ammophila arenaria var. arundinacea, also known as Marram grass, is a type of coastal grass that is native to the North Atlantic coast. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Marram grass include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Marram grass can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used as a dried herb in various herbal preparations.
